requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 110 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B (IEC 62368-1 via ICONTEC NTC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——110V / 60Hz / A/B型插头（ICONTEC NTC采用IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——110V / 60Hz / A/B型插頭（ICONTEC NTC採用IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Colombia operates at 110 V / 60 Hz with Type A (ungrounded two-blade) and Type B (grounded three-pin) plugs — the same voltage and plug type as the United States. This is electrically compatible with US-specification hardware, giving Chinese exporters who have already adapted products to the US market a hardware advantage. However, electrical safety certification in Colombia follows ICONTEC NTC standards, which adopt IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment safety) and IEC/EN series standards. Compulsory electrical safety certification for consumer electronic products may be required by ICONTEC or enforced by SIC depending on product category. Power adapters and chargers for wireless/IoT devices sold in Colombia must comply with applicable NTC safety standards. The CRC homologación dossier may also require evidence of electrical safety compliance.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚采用110V/60Hz、A型（未接地双刀片）和B型（接地三脚）插头，与美国电压和插头类型相同。这与美规硬件电气兼容，使已适配美国市场产品的中国出口商具备硬件优势。然而，哥伦比亚的电气安全认证遵循ICONTEC NTC标准，该标准采用IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全）及IEC/EN系列标准。视产品类别，ICONTEC可能要求消费电子产品进行强制电气安全认证，或由SIC执行。在哥伦比亚销售的无线/物联网设备电源适配器和充电器须符合适用NTC安全标准。CRC型式认证文件也可能需要提供电气安全合规证明。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞採用110V/60Hz、A型（未接地雙刀片）和B型（接地三腳）插頭，與美國電壓和插頭類型相同。這與美規硬件電氣相容，使已適配美國市場產品的中國出口商具備硬件優勢。然而，哥倫比亞的電氣安全認證遵循ICONTEC NTC標準，該標準採用IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通信技術設備安全）及IEC/EN系列標準。視產品類別，ICONTEC可能要求消費電子產品進行強制電氣安全認證，或由SIC執行。在哥倫比亞銷售的無線/物聯網裝置電源適配器和充電器須符合適用NTC安全標準。CRC型式認證文件也可能需要提供電氣安全合規證明。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC equivalent of IEC 62368-1 — electrical safety for audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment
Colombia 110 V / 60 Hz / ICONTEC NTC electrical installation standards — mains voltage and frequency reference
IEC/ICONTEC NTC standards for power adapters and chargers — applicable to Wi-Fi routers, IoT hubs, and similar devices
CRC homologación technical dossier — may require electrical safety evidence depending on product category

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information and communication technology equipment is governed by GB 4943.1, which aligns with IEC 62368-1 (transitioning from the former IEC 60950-1 basis). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) requires testing and factory inspection to GB 4943.1 for in-scope products. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/C/I plugs — a different voltage and frequency from Colombia. Products designed for China's 220 V grid will require power supply adaptation (e.g., universal 100–240 V SMPS) for Colombian 110 V use. Chinese CCC safety certificates based on GB 4943.1 are not recognised by ICONTEC or SIC in Colombia.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息和通信技术设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1规范，与IEC 62368-1对齐（从原IEC 60950-1基础过渡而来）。CCC（中国强制认证）要求对范围内产品按GB 4943.1进行检测和工厂检查。中国采用220V/50Hz、A/C/I型插头——与哥伦比亚的电压和频率不同。针对中国220V电网设计的产品须进行电源适配（如通用100–240V开关电源）方可用于哥伦比亚110V环境。基于GB 4943.1的中国CCC安全证书不被哥伦比亚ICONTEC或SIC承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊和通信技術設備的電氣安全由GB 4943.1規範，與IEC 62368-1對齊（從原IEC 60950-1基礎過渡而來）。CCC（中國強制認證）要求對範圍內產品按GB 4943.1進行檢測和工廠檢查。中國採用220V/50Hz、A/C/I型插頭——與哥倫比亞的電壓和頻率不同。針對中國220V電網設計的產品須進行電源適配（如通用100–240V開關電源）方可用於哥倫比亞110V環境。基於GB 4943.1的中國CCC安全證書不被哥倫比亞ICONTEC或SIC承認。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — China electrical safety standard for IT/ICT equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for in-scope electrical and IT products sold in China
China 220 V / 50 Hz mains standard — differs from Colombia 110 V / 60 Hz; hardware adaptation required

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates based on GB 4943.1 are not recognised in Colombia. Electrical safety compliance in Colombia requires evidence against the applicable ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 standard. Importantly, China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz — products designed exclusively for China's grid will need a universal or 110 V-rated power supply for Colombia. However, Chinese exporters who have already adapted products for the US market (110 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B) are in an advantageous position: the hardware and power supply are already Colombian-grid-compatible. A separate ICONTEC NTC IEC 62368-1 safety test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is still required for the CRC dossier or for any compulsory ICONTEC certification.
gap.zh: 基于GB 4943.1的中国CCC电气安全证书在哥伦比亚不被认可。哥伦比亚电气安全合规须提供符合适用ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1标准的证明。重要的是，中国采用220V/50Hz——专为中国电网设计的产品在哥伦比亚使用时须配备通用或110V额定电源。然而，已针对美国市场（110V/60Hz/A/B型插头）适配产品的中国出口商具备优势：硬件和电源已与哥伦比亚电网兼容。CRC文件或任何强制性ICONTEC认证仍需提供ILAC认可实验室出具的独立ICONTEC NTC IEC 62368-1安全检测报告。
gap.zht: 基於GB 4943.1的中國CCC電氣安全證書在哥倫比亞不被認可。哥倫比亞電氣安全合規須提供符合適用ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1標準的證明。重要的是，中國採用220V/50Hz——專為中國電網設計的產品在哥倫比亞使用時須配備通用或110V額定電源。然而，已針對美國市場（110V/60Hz/A/B型插頭）適配產品的中國出口商具備優勢：硬件和電源已與哥倫比亞電網相容。CRC文件或任何強制性ICONTEC認證仍需提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的獨立ICONTEC NTC IEC 62368-1安全檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for power adapters and chargers — ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 safety compliance required; 110 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B hardware compatibility required for sale in Colombia
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC based on GB 4943.1 required for in-scope electrical and IT products sold in China at 220 V / 50 Hz

source.publisher: ICONTEC — Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia uses 110 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B (US-compatible), giving Chinese exporters with US-spec hardware a grid-compatibility advantage. However, Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised in Colombia. ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 safety test evidence is required. Verify current ICONTEC compulsory certification scope for your product category with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚采用110V/60Hz/A/B型插头（兼容美规），使持有美规硬件的中国出口商具备电网兼容优势。但中国CCC电气安全证书在哥伦比亚不被认可。须提供ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全检测证明。进口前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验您产品类别的现行ICONTEC强制认证范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞採用110V/60Hz/A/B型插頭（相容美規），使持有美規硬件的中國出口商具備電網相容優勢。但中國CCC電氣安全證書在哥倫比亞不被認可。須提供ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全檢測證明。進口前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗您產品類別的現行ICONTEC強制認證範圍。
